faq.sectionSub: Everything you need to know about BG-Zero

q1.question: Is BG-Zero completely free?
q1.answer: Yes, BG-Zero is 100% free to use. There are no watermarks, no file size limits, and no hidden fees. You can remove backgrounds from as many images as you want.

q2.question: Does BG-Zero upload my images to a server?
q2.answer: No. All AI processing runs locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your images never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and data security.

q3.question: Which AI engines does BG-Zero support?
q3.answer: BG-Zero offers three AI engines: imgly (IS-Net model, ~40MB, compatible with all browsers), Transformers.js (RMBG-1.4, ~176MB, best quality, requires WebGPU), and rembg-web (7+ models from 4.7MB, MIT licensed).

q4.question: Can I use BG-Zero offline?
q4.answer: After the first visit, AI model files are cached in your browser. Subsequent visits can process images even without an internet connection, as long as the model cache hasn't been cleared.

q5.question: What image formats are supported?
q5.answer: BG-Zero supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and BMP formats. The maximum file size is 25MB. Results are exported as transparent PNG files.

q6.question: What's the difference between Auto and Manual mode?
q6.answer: Auto mode uses AI to detect and remove backgrounds with one click — perfect for most images. Manual mode lets you pick specific colors with an eyedropper and use Flood Fill for precise removal, with a mask brush to protect areas you want to keep.

compare.heading: Free Alternative to remove.bg
compare.heroSub: BG-Zero offers the same AI-powered background removal as remove.bg — but runs 100% locally in your browser. No upload, no watermark, no subscription.
compare.rowPrivacyBgZero: 100% local — images never leave your device
compare.rowQualityBgZero: Three AI engines to choose from
compare.reason1Desc: Unlike cloud-based tools, BG-Zero processes everything in your browser using WebAssembly. Your photos never touch a server — ideal for sensitive images like personal photos, medical images, or confidential documents.
compare.reason2Desc: No daily limits, no resolution restrictions, no hidden fees. Process as many images as you want at full resolution. Perfect for batch processing product photos or social media content.
compare.reason3Desc: Choose from three engines: imgly for compatibility, Transformers.js for best quality with WebGPU, or rembg-web with 7+ specialized models including anime and portrait modes.
compare.ctaSub: Start removing backgrounds now — no signup required

ecommerce.heading: Product Photo Background Remover
ecommerce.heroSub: Create clean, professional product photos for your online store. Remove backgrounds instantly with AI — right in your browser.
ecommerce.whyTitle: Why Clean Backgrounds Matter for E-commerce
ecommerce.whyDesc: Online marketplaces like Amazon, Shopify, and eBay require white or transparent backgrounds for product listings. Professional product photos with clean backgrounds increase click-through rates by up to 40% and reduce return rates by helping customers see products clearly.
ecommerce.howTitle: How to Remove Product Photo Backgrounds
ecommerce.step1: Upload your product photo (JPG, PNG, or WebP)
ecommerce.step2: AI automatically detects and removes the background
ecommerce.step3: Download the transparent PNG — ready for your listing
ecommerce.benefit1: Consistent look across all product listings
ecommerce.benefit2: Meet marketplace requirements (Amazon, eBay white background)
ecommerce.benefit3: No subscription fees — unlike paid alternatives
ecommerce.benefit4: Process dozens of photos in minutes
ecommerce.benefit5: Your product images stay private — never uploaded to any server
ecommerce.ctaSub: Free, no watermark, no signup required

profile.heading: Profile Picture Background Remover
profile.heroSub: Create professional headshots and avatars by removing distracting backgrounds. Perfect for LinkedIn, resumes, and social media profiles.
profile.whyDesc: A professional profile photo with a clean background makes a strong first impression. Whether you're updating your LinkedIn, creating a resume photo, or setting up a new social media account, a solid or transparent background keeps the focus on you.
profile.howTitle: How to Remove Your Photo Background
profile.step2: AI detects the person and removes the background
profile.step3: Download with transparent background or add a solid color
profile.tip1: Use a well-lit photo with clear contrast between you and the background
profile.tip2: For best results with portraits, use the Transformers.js engine
profile.tip3: Use the manual mode for fine-tuning around hair edges
profile.tip4: Try rembg-web's u2net_human_seg model for portrait-specific processing
profile.privacyDesc: Unlike online headshot editors that upload your face to cloud servers, BG-Zero processes everything locally. Your personal photos never leave your device — important for personal identity images.
profile.ctaSub: Remove background from your portrait now

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BG-Zero ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our website at bg-zero.tech (the "Service").
privacy.imageProcessingTitle: Image Processing — Your Data Stays Local
privacy.imageProcessing: Your images are processed entirely within your browser using WebAssembly and WebGPU technology. We do NOT upload, receive, store, or have any access to your images. No image data ever reaches our servers. This is a core design principle of BG-Zero.
privacy.dataWeCollectIntro: We collect limited personal data necessary to provide the Service:
privacy.dataEmail: Email address — collected during registration or Google OAuth sign-in, used for account management and communication.
privacy.dataPassword: Password hash — stored securely using bcrypt, never in plaintext.
privacy.dataOAuth: Google OAuth profile — name and avatar URL, if you sign in with Google.
privacy.dataSession: Session data — stored in cookies and our database for authentication (7-day expiry).
privacy.dataAnalytics: Analytics events — page views and feature usage, collected for improving the service. No personally identifiable information beyond user ID (for logged-in users).
privacy.dataLogs: Server logs — IP addresses may be temporarily logged for rate limiting and security (retained up to 30 days).
privacy.legalBasis: We process your data under the following legal bases: Contract necessity (Art. 6(1)(b)) for account management and service delivery; Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) for analytics and security.
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We use the following third-party services:
privacy.thirdPartyHosting: Hosting & CDN — for serving the website globally
privacy.thirdPartyDB: Database provider — for storing account data
privacy.thirdPartyResend: Resend (US) — for sending transactional emails (verification, password reset)
privacy.thirdPartyGoogle: Google OAuth (US) — for social login (only when you choose to sign in with Google)
privacy.thirdPartyHF: Hugging Face CDN (US) — for downloading AI model files directly to your browser (no personal data transmitted)
privacy.retention: Account data is retained for the duration of your account. Analytics events are retained for up to 12 months. Server logs are retained for up to 30 days. You may request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable laws, you have the right to:
privacy.rightAccess: Access — request a copy of your personal data
privacy.rightCorrection: Correction — request correction of inaccurate data
privacy.rightDeletion: Deletion — request deletion of your account and data
privacy.rightPortability: Data portability — export your data in machine-readable format
privacy.rightObjection: Object — object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.rightWithdraw: Withdraw consent — where processing is based on consent
privacy.rightsExercise: To exercise these rights, use the account settings page (for deletion and export) or email us at privacy@bg-zero.tech.
privacy.children: BG-Zero is not directed at children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at privacy@bg-zero.tech.
privacy.security: We implement appropriate security measures including: HTTPS encryption, bcrypt password hashing, Content Security Policy headers, rate limiting, and secure session management.
privacy.international: Your data may be processed in the United States through our service providers. We ensure appropriate safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses) are in place for EU/UK data transfers.
privacy.changes: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email. The "Effective Date" at the top indicates when this policy was last revised.
privacy.contact: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at: privacy@bg-zero.tech
privacy.supervisory: EU/UK residents have the right to lodge a complaint with their local data protection authority if they believe their data has been processed unlawfully.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance: By accessing or using BG-Zero (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.serviceDesc: BG-Zero is a free, open-source AI-powered background removal tool. All image processing runs locally in your web browser. We do not upload, store, or access your images.
terms.noWarranty: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. We do not guarantee accuracy, reliability, or availability of the Service. This is consistent with AGPL-3.0 Sections 15-17.
terms.account: You may create an account to access certain features. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information during registration.
terms.prohibitedIntro: You agree NOT to use the Service to:
terms.prohibited1: Process, create, or distribute child sexual abuse material (CSAM)
terms.prohibited2: Create deepfake content for defamation, fraud, or impersonation
terms.prohibited3: Process copyrighted images for commercial counterfeiting without authorization
terms.prohibited4: Conduct automated mass requests, DDoS attacks, or scraping against our servers
terms.prohibited5: Violate any applicable law or regulation
terms.prohibited6: Circumvent security measures or abuse the Service infrastructure
terms.content: You retain all rights to your images. BG-Zero does not claim any rights over your content — because we never receive it. You are solely responsible for ensuring you have the right to process any images you upload.
terms.ip: The BG-Zero source code is owned by its contributors and licensed under AGPL-3.0. The BG-Zero name, logo, and branding are owned by the project maintainers.
terms.modelLicense: Different AI engines use models with different licenses. The Transformers.js engine uses RMBG-1.4 which is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0 (non-commercial use only). Users are responsible for complying with model licenses. The rembg-web engine uses MIT-licensed models suitable for any use.
terms.termination: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms. You may delete your account at any time through account settings.
terms.limitation: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, BG-Zero and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of data or profits, arising from your use of the Service.
terms.indemnity: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless BG-Zero and its contributors from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your violation of these Terms or misuse of the Service.
terms.governingLaw: These Terms are governed by the laws of Hong Kong SAR, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Hong Kong.
terms.changes: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via email to registered users.
terms.contact: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: legal@bg-zero.tech
terms.abuse: To report abuse or violations, email: abuse@bg-zero.tech

accessibility.heading: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: BG-Zero is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We aim to conform with WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards.
accessibility.status: Partially conformant. We are actively working to improve accessibility across all pages.
accessibility.measure1: Semantic HTML structure with ARIA landmarks
accessibility.measure3: Color contrast ratios meeting WCAG AA standards
accessibility.knownIssues: We are aware of and working on the following accessibility issues. If you encounter additional barriers, please let us know.
accessibility.feedback: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of BG-Zero. Please contact us at: accessibility@bg-zero.tech
accessibility.enforcement: If you are not satisfied with our response to your accessibility concern, you may escalate to your local equality body or regulatory authority.

dmca.heading: DMCA Copyright Notice
dmca.intro: BG-Zero processes images entirely within the user's browser. We do not store, host, or transmit user-uploaded images. We are therefore generally not a "service provider" under 17 U.S.C. Section 512 with respect to user-processed images.
dmca.websiteContent: If you believe our website content (not user-processed images) infringes your copyright, please send a DMCA-compliant notice to:
dmca.requirementsIntro: A valid DMCA notice must include:
dmca.req1: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to be infringed
dmca.req2: Identification of the material that is claimed to be infringing and its location on our site
dmca.req3: Your contact information (name, address, phone, email)
dmca.req4: A statement that you have a good faith belief the use is not authorized
dmca.req5: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information is accurate and you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner
dmca.response: We will respond to valid DMCA notices within 48 hours and take appropriate action.
